brief: Canadian wildfires degrade US air quality, FDA approves new cholesterol pill, Genoa bridge officials sentenced, and AI-generated book controversy emerges alongside studies on academic networking and AI adoption in public agencies.
news_summary: More than 800 Canadian wildfires cause hazardous air in Michigan and Minnesota; FDA approves a new pill to slash cholesterol; Italian officials get prison for Genoa bridge collapse; AI-generated unauthorized biographies pollute Amazon.
papers_summary: Research tracks academic networking amid precarity, L2 writing positioning patterns, and AI adoption in a state DOT, along with tools for multivariate graph analysis and LLM-generated text detection.

en.brief: Canadian wildfires degrade US air quality, FDA approves new cholesterol pill, Genoa bridge officials sentenced, and AI-generated book controversy emerges alongside studies on academic networking and AI adoption in public agencies.
en.news_summary: More than 800 Canadian wildfires cause hazardous air in Michigan and Minnesota; FDA approves a new pill to slash cholesterol; Italian officials get prison for Genoa bridge collapse; AI-generated unauthorized biographies pollute Amazon.
en.papers_summary: Research tracks academic networking amid precarity, L2 writing positioning patterns, and AI adoption in a state DOT, along with tools for multivariate graph analysis and LLM-generated text detection.

zh.brief: 中國在全球好感度調查中首次超越美國；泰國曼谷酒吧大火致32死，暴露法規漏洞；台灣白色恐怖檔案解密引發歷史補課潮；學術打假風波持續。美國FDA批准新型降膽固醇藥物，意大利法官因大橋坍塌判刑。
zh.news_summary: 皮尤調查顯示全球對中國好感度首超美國，習近平支持率高於特朗普；霍爾木茲海峽替代路線難以取代其戰略地位；LV告茉莉奶白案引發維權與輿論衝突；泰國曼谷酒吧大火揭示監管與腐敗問題。
zh.papers_summary: 研究探討學術流動與不穩定網絡、L2學生寫作中的定位模式、以及AI生成文本的檢測方法。
